channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned commercial bin with a build up of flytipping, 11th July
item.description:
Abandoned commercial bin with a build up of flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wrottesley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drone privacy invasion, 11th July
item.description:
Regular drone flying over Asylum Rd, Kings Grove, Montpelier Rd, past week or so. Covering and watching private gardens whilst people are out in the hot weather, forcing people indoors. Is this legal? Operator must be in the local area. A drone peeping tom?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King's Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burwash Road sign being used as a spot for flytipping rubbish, 11th July
item.description:
This spot is being used to dump rubbish bags, the first bag was left about 3 weeks ago, and since further bags/general rubbish have been left in the spot. Without clearing, I imagine more and more rubbish will pile up in the spot.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burwash Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken chain link fence, 11th July
item.description:
For over a year the chain link fence adjacent to the pavement in the green space at the top of Murray Avenue has been broken in several places. This is causing footpath erosion across grass and increased use as a cut through by e bikes and scooters. It detracts from the overall experience of this important green space.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Engines idling, 11th July
item.description:
Several cars, cabs, ubers are ofter parked in the street with engine on for several hours during the day.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on pink wall - Peckham High St, 11th July
item.description:
Please remove this black graffiti tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low Graffiti tag on wall, 11th July
item.description:
Public facing wall. please remove the tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 11th July
item.description:
General rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridgebrook Road, Kidbrooke

item.title: Large red graffiti tag on wall, 11th July
item.description:
Please cover this up, as before

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Lot s of litter on the area of Marmont Road, 11th July
item.description:
Please pick this all up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Lime bike on pavement at corner of Rectory Road and Beckenham Road, 11th July
item.description:
The bike is obstructing the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Litter picking needed on Elcot Avenue, 11th July
item.description:
This area hasn't been cleaned up for months. Please send someone ASAP, there's a lot that needs to be done. thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107, Friary Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Basket flytipped, 11th July
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th July
item.description:
Continuous fly tipping in the street. Daily issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beechwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked equipment, 11th July
item.description:
There are padlocks on both the zip line and a balance tire in the playground area at Danson Park. On my visit today, there was lovely weather and it is not appropriate to have blocked off this equipment to prevent the children from using it. If there is a specific safety concern, some signage could have been put up. If the concern is general, parents are in the best position to decide how much risk they accept for their children. The equipment has been paid by the taxpayers, and it’s a shame that is not available for use.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very heavy bag, 11th July
item.description:
Could it be removed please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexis Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of rubbish dumped AGAIN !!, 11th July
item.description:
I personally reported same issue 3 times at the same spot just this week Clearly this is from now on used as dumping ground. Council needs to start taking urgent action as we are facing here ongoing problem! This place needs cameras installed!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Branches Require Pruning, 11th July
item.description:
Large tree close to the car park of Grace Mews and Samos Rd SE20 requires its lower branches to be cut. You have to stoop when you walk underneath it to avoid branches hitting your face

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 11th July
item.description:
The street it's still a mess even after your intervention. Please send someone over for a thorough clean. Regards

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rosina Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th July
item.description:
Double white dirty mattress has been dumped by 10 edgehill court SIDCUP Kent into the pathed area leading into Carlton road fields from the crescent ( gated area ) on the left hand side amongst the trees.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marston Court, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
